author: Haroen Viaene
subject: fix(hooks-web): don't pass widget props to ui components (algolia/react-instantsearch#3501)
body:
* fix(hooks-web): don't pass widget props to ui components

Similar to algolia/react-instantsearch#3499, but i did a search for other places props was used literally in -web

We'd get a typescript error for these if https://github.com/microsoft/TypeScript/issues/39998 was fixed, but that doesn't seem to be on their table yet

* Update packages/react-instantsearch-hooks-web/src/widgets/HitsPerPage.tsx

Co-authored-by: François Chalifour <francoischalifour@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: François Chalifour <francoischalifour@users.noreply.github.com>
